title: Separate Label and API Name Columns in Dictionary Export and Remove Internal IDs
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want Label and API Name as separate columns in my export, so that I don't have to manually split them after exporting.
description:
Two refinements to the dictionary object export:

1. **Separate Label and API Name**: When exporting or copying to clipboard, split the combined Label/API Name field into two distinct columns. These columns can be hidden in the UI but must appear in exports.

2. **Remove internal auto-increment IDs**: Never display internal auto-incrementing database IDs to end users, as they reveal tenant position relative to other customers. Remove from all user-facing views and exports.
acceptance_criteria: Exported data has separate Label and API Name columns
Copy to clipboard includes separate Label and API Name columns
Internal auto-incrementing IDs are not visible anywhere to end users
Applied to both Dictionary and Migration pages
ux_changes: Separate Label and API Name columns in export. Internal IDs removed from all user-facing views.
middleware_changes: Export query and formatter updated to split label/API name and exclude internal IDs.
implementation_notes: Security improvement: internal auto-increment IDs expose tenant ordering. Applied to dictionary and migration.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed on dev for both dictionary and migration pages.
